issues.description: Main effect condition missing TrashCount check. Text states 'If you have 15 or more cards in your trash' but condition is Always. Should be TrashCount:15+

Rest action is not conditional. Text says 'You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards' as prerequisite, but Rest is listed as mandatory action. Should be optional/conditional or restructured with proper cost modeling

PowerBoost target scope incorrect. Text restricts to '{Straw Hat Crew} type Leader or Character cards' but target scope is ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader with no type filter. Should filter by LeaderHasType or character type constraint
Counter effect condition missing TrashCount check. Text states 'If you have 15 or more cards in your trash' but condition is Always. Should be TrashCount:15+
